title: Molecular Orbitals: From Atoms to Molecules
description: Learn how atomic orbitals combine to form molecular orbitals, the foundation for understanding chemical bonding and molecular electronic structure in quantum chemistry.
learningObjectives: Explain the Linear Combination of Atomic Orbitals (LCAO) method
Distinguish between bonding, antibonding, and nonbonding molecular orbitals
Construct molecular orbital diagrams for diatomic molecules
Apply molecular orbital theory to predict bond order and magnetic properties
Understand sigma and pi molecular orbital symmetries
Connect molecular orbitals to quantum chemistry simulation
